basic_details.job_title: Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on the official website shipindia.com. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: CMA Intermediate (all groups) cleared from ICMAI and registered for final course, Minimum one year relevant experience after CMA intermediate
qualification.details: CMA students having registered and cleared intermediate level exam (all groups) of The Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI) and must be registered for final course as on 01.07.2026. Minimum one (01) year relevant experience after passing CMA intermediate level.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Shipping Corporation of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Shipping Corporation of India Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Vacancy Details 2026
Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: CMA students having registered and cleared intermediate level exam (all groups) of The Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI) and must be registered for final course as on 01.07.2026. Minimum one (01) year relevant experience after passing CMA intermediate level.

content_sections.heading: Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Salary 2026
Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Shipping Corporation of India to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Shipping Corporation of India CMA Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CMA Trainee posts is 28th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for CMA Trainee posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the CMA Trainee position by the Shipping Corporation of India in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the CMA Trainee role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have cleared all groups of CMA Intermediate from ICMAI and be registered for the final course. A minimum of one year of relevant experience after CMA Intermediate is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CMA Trainee position?
faq.answer: The salary for the CMA Trainee position is Rs. 27,000/- per month for the first year and Rs. 30,000/- per month for the second year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the CMA Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CMA Trainee posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CMA Trainee recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CMA Trainee posts is entirely online through the official website of the Shipping Corporation of India.

faq.question: Q8. What is the eligibility date for the CMA Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The date for reckoning eligibility criteria for the CMA Trainee posts is 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Shipping Corporation of India located?
faq.answer: The Shipping Corporation of India is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The CMA Trainee position is a contractual job opportunity offered by the Shipping Corporation of India.
